All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Baker
Worker that prepares orders and places finished pizzas into storage.
BlockingList<T>
Thread-safe bounded list with blocking put and take operations.
Courier
Worker that takes ready orders from storage and delivers them in batches.
Order
Represents a customer order with arrival and delivery timings.
Pizzeria
Coordinates a full pizzeria workday simulation.
PizzeriaConfig
Immutable configuration of a pizzeria workday simulation.
PizzeriaConfigParser
Parses a pizzeria configuration from a JSON file.
